entries.title: Sermon 28 on the NT
entries.excerpt: [LXXVIII. Ben.] On the words of the Gospel, Matthew 17:1 , After six days Jesus takes with Him Peter, and James, and John his brother, etc. We must now look into and treat of that vision which the Lord showed on the mount. For it is this of which He had said, Verily I say unto you, there be some standing here which shall not taste of death till they see the Son of Man in His Kingdom. Then began the passage which has just been read. When He had said this, after six days He took three disciples, Peter, and James, and John, and went up into a mountain. These three were those some, of whom He had…
